case_title: CINDY GRACIELA LOPEZ VS. ALEXANDRE J. CHORIN

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY LOPEZ, CINDY GRACIELA CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, CINDY GRACIELA AS TO DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, CINDY GRACIELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHORIN, ALEXANDRE J. $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,635.00, THE COURT FINDS THE DAMAGES PROVEN ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT WERE $3500.00 AND THE ACCIDENT WAS WHOLLY THE FAULT OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
